name: Roasted Vegetable Pan Bagna
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, quartered with stems and seeds removed
1 medium Red onion, halved lengthwise and cut into 1/2 -inch half moons
12 oz Eggplant, cut into 1/4-inch half moons
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
4 Italian hero rolls or small semolina loaves
2 oz Anchovy fillets, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Combine the tomato, garlic, zucchini, red pepper, onion, eggplant, and olive oil in a large roasting pan or jelly-roll pan. Toss to coat with oil.
3. Bake, turning often, until the vegetables are browned and tender, about 45 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, chop the parsley, rosemary, and thyme together. Stir into the vegetables during the last 15 minutes of baking.
5. Remove from the oven and add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Preheat the broiler or toaster oven.
7. Split the rolls open like a book and toast until the cut sides are lightly golden.
8. Divide the warm vegetables among the rolls. Top each with 2 or 3 anchovy fillets. Scatter the arugula on top.
9. Fold the top of the roll over the filling and serve.
